quests.title: Atlas Prime Rebuild
quests.desired_end_state: A verified Atlas Prime successor repository with Quest Board continuity, controlled source evolution, recovery proof, and an explicitly approved cutover from Atlas Codex.

emberline.current_gate: One Massive Arrow v4 corrected payload and Stage 0/1 executor preparation
completed_durable_work: Codex remains canonical and Prime remains SHADOW.
chat_only_or_uncertain: The corrected Arrow payload and executor are prepared locally but are not durable source until a later approved PR is merged.
The Quest completion range remains a broad low-confidence estimate pending C07 and later migration gates.
remaining_work: Compile every existing-file transform through Stage 0.
Audit complete candidate bytes and diffs.
Create and audit the coordinated Codex and Prime source PRs.
Resume C07 and later migration gates after the architecture work is closed.
Prove Quest Board cutover and rollback before authority changes.
emberline.protected_boundary_posture: No raw Drive, finance, health, clinic, runtime, account, or infrastructure evidence belongs in GitHub.
emberline.next_safe_action: Run sealed Stage 0 against clean local clones and review the receipt.
emberline.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson approval to fire Stage 0; Stage 1 remains separately gated.
must_not_happen_yet: Do not create source PRs before Stage 0 PASS and audit.
Do not merge, activate S1, move Drive material, promote Prime, retire Codex, or cut over.

campaigns.title: Atlas Codex to Prime Migration
campaigns.current_gate: C07 protected source-standard semantic reconciliation remains pending after the Arrow architecture gate.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Preserve C07 as an explicit later gate; do not absorb it silently.

campaigns.title: Google Drive Dependency Retirement
campaigns.current_gate: Durable retirement plan and exception register source PR not yet created.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Compile and audit the Drive governance candidates in Stage 0.

campaigns.title: Athena's Spear and Artemis's Bow and Arrow
campaigns.current_gate: Corrected one-Arrow payload and Stage 0/1 executor preparation.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Run Stage 0 read-only compilation and Noctua audit.

campaigns.title: Quest Board and Emberline Architecture
campaigns.current_gate: SHADOW schema, crosswalk, template, and parent Quest checkpoint prepared locally.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Compile and audit all governing-source reconciliations in Stage 0.

completion_range.basis: Control-plane foundation and delta closure exist, but C07, source PRs, generated follow-through, recovery proof, and cutover remain.

quests.next_approval_gate: Explicit Stage 0 firing approval, followed by Noctua review before Stage 1.
